overall.description: Gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West featuring a character riding a mechanical Sunwing mount over a tropical coastal landscape with ancient ruins, clear skies, and vibrant turquoise waters. The sequence shows smooth aerial navigation from open sea through coastal canyons toward towering overgrown structures.

scene_state.functional_zone: tropical sea approach to overgrown ruins island

agents.ego_description: flying steadily over open turquoise water approaching the tropical coastline on a mechanical Sunwing mount

entered.detail: tall overgrown stone spire covered in vegetation rising from the island center
lush green island landmass with white sand beaches and dense jungle
crystal clear tropical water with visible coral reefs beneath the surface

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a wide aerial view over tropical waters, approaching a lush island covered in ancient ruins. The mechanical Sunwing flies steadily toward the coastline where white sand beaches and palm trees become visible, with a massive overgrown tower dominating the distant skyline.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal flight along white sand beaches

events.description: begins banking left to follow the curvature of the coastline

agents.ego_description: skimming along the coastline at low altitude, passing over white sand beaches and palm tree clusters

entered.detail: cluster of tall palm trees lining the beach edge
steep rocky cliffs with patches of green vegetation rising from the shoreline
pristine white sand beach with gentle waves lapping at the shore

segments.scene_description: Flying along the tropical coastline, the camera passes over pristine white sand beaches and palm tree groves. The terrain transitions from open beach to rocky cliff faces as the Sunwing banks left, keeping the ancient ruins tower visible in the distance to the left while navigating the shoreline.

scene_state.functional_zone: navigating through narrow canyon with waterfalls

events.description: executes sharp banked turn into narrow canyon passage between rock walls
passes waterfall cascading down cliff face on the right side

agents.ego_description: maneuvering through tight canyon passages with sharp banking turns, navigating between rock walls

entered.detail: tall vertical rock walls forming a narrow canyon passage
waterfall cascading down the cliff face into the canyon below
thick green jungle vegetation covering the canyon floor

segments.scene_description: The Sunwing enters a narrow canyon, executing sharp banking turns between towering rock walls. A waterfall cascades down the right cliff face as the mount navigates the enclosed space, with the ancient ruins tower now visible ahead to the right. Dense jungle canopy fills the canyon floor below.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching ancient tower complex with boost jets active

events.description: activates blue boost jets while ascending toward the ruins
exits canyon into open area with towering ruins ahead

agents.ego_description: flying upward toward the ancient tower structures with blue boost propulsion active, gaining altitude

entered.detail: ruined stone bridge structure connecting cliff edges across the canyon

segments.scene_description: Exiting the canyon, the Sunwing activates its blue boost jets and ascends toward the massive ancient ruins tower. The scene opens into a wider area with a ruined stone bridge visible, while the overgrown tower looms large ahead. The mount gains altitude as it approaches the towering structure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous aerial journey over tropical waters that gradually transitions into a close-range navigation of a rugged coastline. It begins with a wide view over vibrant turquoise seas, gliding steadily toward a lush island where white sand beaches and a massive, overgrown ancient tower emerge on the horizon. As the camera approaches the shore, the open water gives way to pristine sands and groves of palm trees. The scene then shifts as the mechanical Sunwing banks left, moving from the soft beach terrain toward steep, rocky cliff faces while keeping the distant ruins in sight.

The shot follows a continuous aerial trajectory from the claustrophobic confines of a jungle canyon into a wide, open ascent toward a massive ancient ruin. It begins with the Sunwing executing sharp banking turns between towering rock walls, gliding past a cascading waterfall while a dense jungle canopy blankets the floor below. As the mount navigates the enclosed space, the view opens up to reveal a distant stone tower to the right, prompting the camera to exit the canyon. The scene then expands into a broad vista featuring a ruined stone bridge as the Sunwing activates its blue boost jets to climb rapidly. Finally, the camera gains altitude, shifting from the narrow valley to a soaring approach toward the looming, overgrown structure.
